changeSet.author: awoestmann@intevation.de
tom@intevation.de
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE iam_institution_user -- Allow a single primary institution per user ADD COLUMN is_primary_institution boolean CHECK(is_primary_institution IS NOT FALSE), ADD UNIQUE(user_id, is_primary_institution);

changeSet.author: pschwabauer@intevation.de
pschwabauer@intevation.de
christoph.klassen@intevation.de
pschwabauer@intevation.de
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE iam_institution DROP COLUMN imis_usergroup_id;

changeSet.author: tom@intevation.de
tom@intevation.de
christoph.klassen@intevation.de
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE iam_institution ADD COLUMN service_building_state VARCHAR;

changeSet.author: pschwabauer@intevation.de
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE iam_institution ADD CONSTRAINT meas_facil_id_unique UNIQUE (meas_facil_id), ALTER COLUMN meas_facil_name DROP NOT NULL, ADD CONSTRAINT measure_facil_or_not CHECK ( (meas_facil_id IS NULL AND meas_facil_name IS NULL) OR (meas_facil_id IS NOT NULL AND meas_facil_name IS NOT NULL) );

changeSet.author: christoph.klassen@intevation.de
tom@intevation.de
christoph.klassen@intevation.de
tom@intevation.de
christoph.klassen@intevation.de
pschwabauer@intevation.de
tom@intevation.de
christoph.klassen@intevation.de
pschwabauer@intevation.de
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE iam_user_attributes ADD COLUMN hidden_in_addressbook boolean DEFAULT false;

changeSet.author: swagner@intevation.de
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW keycloak.v_user_entity (id, email, email_constraint, email_verified, enabled, federation_link, first_name, last_name, realm_id, username, create_time, service_account_client_link, not_before) AS SELECT id, email, email_constraint, email_verified, enabled, federation_link, first_name, last_name, realm_id, username, to_timestamp(created_timestamp/1000.0), service_account_client_link, not_before FROM keycloak.user_entity;

changeSet.author: swagner@intevation.de
